headline: 7 Stocks Leading the Real Estate Recovery
summary: Commercial real estate is recovering and stocks in the sector are undervalued. Companies like JLL, NMRK, and CBRE present profitable investment opportunities.

headline: Interra Capital Group Acquires Greenway Plaza, a 4.5 Million-Square-Foot, 53-Acre Landmark Mixed-Use Campus in Houston - CBRE Appointed to Lead Leasing
summary: Interra Capital Group today announced its acquisition of Greenway Plaza, a landmark 53-acre, approximately 4.5 million-square-foot mixed-use office campus in the heart of Houston.
